name: Easter Coated Pretzils
recipeInstructions:
-------------
1. Use leftover colors from making Easter candy to coat pretzels for the little ones.
They love the different colored pretzels, and especially the chocolate ones.
2. Melt the coatings, chocolate, or white in small bowls over a pan of warm water.
Do not melt it hot.
3. Dip the pretzels into the melted coating and lift with a fork, shaking off excess.
4. Lay the coated pretzels on a wax paper-coated cookie sheet that fits in your freezer.
You don't have to use the freezer; they will set as long as you store them in the fridge or freezer.
5. Good Luck and Enjoy from Joni in Jersey!
Jenilee and Scott love to coat animal crackers when they were little – I still do. Yum!
